jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Bikanervala
jsonLd.description:
Bikanervala is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bikanervala:
Bikanervala is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bikanervala!
